title: Ability to use one column in multiple questions on a form
excerpt: As an admin, I would like to be able to utilize one columns data options for multiple questions in a form. Instead of having to have multiple instances of the same column.

posts.author: HAMondayAdmin (Andrea)
posts.cookedHtml: As an admin, I would like to be able to utilize one columns data options for multiple questions in a form. Instead of having to have multiple instances of the same column.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Andrea! This isn’t possible at the moment but you could duplicate the same column and then “hide” the other columns so you don’t have to see them clunking up your board.

I’d love to know more about your use case and reasons for using the same column repeatedly so I can help you find a better solution! Let me know about your workflow and I’ll see how I can help!
